final_text:
**Verdict:** signaling storm is on **SL-MMTC-01**; **other slices are not affected by the storm**. Separate unrelated degradation exists on **SL-URLLC-01**.

### Alarm correlation
| Evidence | Finding |
|---|---|
| `query_alerts` on `GNB-PER-01` | Recent site alarm is **RACH_OVERLOAD** with description **“mMTC origin”**. |
| `query_alerts` on candidate slices/cells | **SL-MMTC-01** has **MAJOR SIGNALING_STORM**: “mass-reattach storm… **eMBB/URLLC slices protected**.” |

### Slice involved
| Slice | Type | Tenant | PER coverage evidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| **SL-MMTC-01** | mMTC | MeteringIoT | `query_graph` shows it carried on **CELL-PER-01-1-2** and **CELL-PER-01-2-2** under **GNB-PER-01**. |

### Are other slices affected?
| Slice | Status | Evidence |
|---|---|---|
| **SL-EMBB-01** | **No storm impact seen** | `query_telemetry`: latency ~12.8–15.3 ms, PRB ~40–63%, throughput strong; no alarms returned. |
| **SL-EMBB-02** | **No storm impact seen** | `query_telemetry`: latency ~12.7–14.9 ms, PRB ~43–63%; no alarms returned. |
| **SL-URLLC-02** | **No storm impact seen** | `query_telemetry`: latency ~2.9–3.5 ms, PRB ~43–63%; no alarms returned. |
| **SL-MMTC-02** | **No explicit storm alarm** | Present on GNB-PER-01, but only **SL-MMTC-01** carries the signaling-storm alarm. |
| **SL-URLLC-01** | **Affected, but by separate issue** | `query_alerts`: **CRITICAL SLA_BREACH**; `query_telemetry`: latency ~12.7–13.8 ms, PRB **96%**. This is not tagged as signaling storm. |

### Assessment
- **Impacted signaling slice:** **SL-MMTC-01**.
- **Storm spread to other slices:** **No evidence**. Alarm text explicitly says **eMBB/URLLC protected**, and their telemetry is broadly normal except **SL-URLLC-01**, which has an **independent SLA/PRB issue**.
- **Operational note:** this site has **two concurrent conditions** on `GNB-PER-01`:
  1. **mMTC signaling storm on SL-MMTC-01**
  2. **separate URLLC congestion/SLA breach on SL-URLLC-01**
